top.name: Glyph Network
top.rules_text: All prepared tiles trigger simultaneously. Each deals its effect plus 1 bonus per other tile triggered.

channel.name: Glyph Network (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Prepared glyphs not consumed when triggered this way

bottom.name: Spell Anchor
bottom.rules_text: Prepare on tile: the next spell you cast while standing on this tile is cast twice.

channel.name: Spell Anchor (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: The copy spell costs 0 mana
